---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the Databricks App, SQL function, or MCP examples
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What are you trying to do?**
The underlying goal — not just the feature. ("I want to X" not "add a button that Y".)

**What's missing today?**
What you tried, and where it fell short.

**Proposed solution**
Your idea, if you have one. Sketches, example CLI output, or a rough API shape all help.

**Note:** feature ideas for the hosted platform itself (Studio, Admin, billing,
new render lanes) are welcome too — email info@zorost.com or use the feedback
link in the app, since that code lives outside this repository.
